name: Dual Front Airbags
whatItIs: Front airbags for driver and passenger that deploy in a frontal crash.
whyItMatters: The single biggest reducer of fatal injury in frontal impacts. Now mandatory in India.

name: 6 Airbags
whatItIs: Adds side and curtain airbags to the front pair, protecting the torso and head in side impacts.
whyItMatters: Side impacts are common at urban junctions and curtain airbags dramatically cut head-injury risk.
whoNeedsIt: Families; anyone in city traffic daily.

name: Electronic Stability Control
whatItIs: Brakes individual wheels automatically to stop a skid or slide.
whyItMatters: Proven to cut single-vehicle loss-of-control crashes by roughly a third.
whoNeedsIt: Everyone, especially highway and monsoon drivers.

name: ABS with EBD
whatItIs: Prevents wheel lock-up under hard braking and balances brake force front-to-rear.
whyItMatters: Lets you steer while braking hard. Mandatory equipment in India.

name: Level 2 ADAS
whatItIs: A camera/radar suite that combines adaptive cruise, lane keeping and emergency braking.
whyItMatters: Acts as a second pair of eyes — it can brake or steer before you react.
whoNeedsIt: Highway commuters; anyone driving fatigued hours.

name: Autonomous Emergency Braking
whatItIs: Detects an imminent collision and applies brakes automatically if you don't.
whyItMatters: Cuts rear-end crashes by around 40% in real-world studies.

name: Lane Keep Assist
whatItIs: Nudges the steering to keep the car centred if you drift out of lane.
whyItMatters: Counters the micro-sleeps and phone glances behind many highway accidents.

name: Blind Spot Monitor
whatItIs: Warns of vehicles sitting in your over-the-shoulder blind spot, usually via mirror icons or a camera feed.
whyItMatters: Two-wheelers in India live in your blind spot; this flags them before a lane change.
whoNeedsIt: Urban drivers; anyone on multi-lane highways.

name: Adaptive Cruise Control
whatItIs: Cruise control that automatically maintains a set gap to the car ahead.
whyItMatters: Removes constant speed-adjustment fatigue on expressways.

name: Rear Parking Camera
whatItIs: Camera view of what's behind while reversing, with guidelines.
whyItMatters: Prevents low-speed scrapes and protects children and pets you can't see.
whoNeedsIt: Everyone parking in tight Indian spaces.

name: 360° Camera
whatItIs: Stitched top-down view from four cameras for parking.
whyItMatters: Takes the guesswork out of kerbs, pillars and tight gaps.
whoNeedsIt: Drivers in cramped city parking; new drivers.

name: Front Parking Sensors
whatItIs: Beeping proximity sensors in the front bumper.
whyItMatters: Saves bumper paint in nose-in parking.

name: Tyre Pressure Monitor
whatItIs: Live tyre pressure readout with low-pressure warnings.
whyItMatters: Slow punctures at highway speed are a major blowout cause.
whoNeedsIt: Highway drivers; anyone skipping weekly pressure checks.

name: ISOFIX Child Seat Mounts
whatItIs: Standardised rigid anchors for child seats on rear seats.
whyItMatters: A correctly anchored child seat is vastly safer than a belt-routed one.

name: Hill Hold Assist
whatItIs: Holds the brakes for a couple of seconds when starting on a slope.
whyItMatters: No rollback stress on flyover ramps and basement exits.

name: Sunroof
whatItIs: Single-pane tilting/sliding glass roof.
whyItMatters: Adds light and airiness; in India it is largely a desirability feature.

name: Panoramic Sunroof
whatItIs: Full-length glass roof over both rows.
whyItMatters: Transforms cabin feel, though it adds weight and heat load.

name: Ventilated Front Seats
whatItIs: Fans in the seat that blow air through perforated upholstery.
whyItMatters: In Indian summers this is the most-used comfort feature in the car — back sweat gone.
whoNeedsIt: Anyone in a hot, humid city. Genuinely everyone.

name: Leatherette Upholstery
whatItIs: Synthetic leather seat covering.
whyItMatters: Easier to clean than fabric and lifts perceived quality.

name: Powered Driver Seat
whatItIs: Electric adjustment for the driver's seat, often 6-8 way.
whyItMatters: Fine-grained adjustment helps shared cars and long drives.

name: Automatic Climate Control
whatItIs: Set a temperature and the AC manages fan and compressor itself.
whyItMatters: Removes constant manual fiddling; keeps cabin stable.

name: Rear AC Vents
whatItIs: Air vents for the second row.
whyItMatters: Rear passengers in Indian heat need direct airflow — non-negotiable for families.
whoNeedsIt: Anyone who regularly carries rear passengers.

name: In-built Air Purifier
whatItIs: Cabin air purifier, sometimes with AQI display.
whyItMatters: Helps in high-AQI metro winters, though cabin filters do most of the work.
whoNeedsIt: Delhi-NCR and other high-AQI city dwellers.

name: 8" Touchscreen
whatItIs: 8-inch central infotainment touchscreen.
whyItMatters: Baseline for navigation and media duties.

name: 10"+ Touchscreen
whatItIs: Large-format (10-12 inch) infotainment display.
whyItMatters: Easier glanceability for maps; mostly a perceived-premium upgrade.

name: Wireless CarPlay / Android Auto
whatItIs: Phone projection without plugging in a cable.
whyItMatters: The feature you touch every single drive; wireless removes daily friction.

name: Digital Instrument Cluster
whatItIs: Fully digital driver's display, often 10+ inches.
whyItMatters: Configurable maps/info in your sightline; mostly aesthetic beyond that.

name: Head-Up Display
whatItIs: Speed and navigation projected ahead of the driver.
whyItMatters: Keeps eyes on the road, though small HUDs wash out in bright sun.
whoNeedsIt: Highway drivers who use navigation constantly.

name: Connected Car Tech
whatItIs: SIM-based remote app control: pre-cool, locate, geofence, remote lock.
whyItMatters: Remote pre-cooling before you reach a parked car is the killer feature in summer.
whoNeedsIt: Urban professionals; parents tracking shared cars.

name: Wireless Phone Charger
whatItIs: Qi charging pad in the centre console.
whyItMatters: Convenient top-ups, though slower than a cable.
whoNeedsIt: Wireless-CarPlay users whose phones drain fast.

name: Branded Premium Audio
whatItIs: Upgraded speaker system (Bose, JBL, Sony, Harman).
whyItMatters: Noticeably better staging at moderate volumes; diminishing returns in road noise.

name: Auto LED Headlamps
whatItIs: LED projector headlamps that switch on automatically in low light.
whyItMatters: LED throw and auto-on at dusk are genuine safety aids on unlit roads.
whoNeedsIt: Anyone driving at night outside city cores.

name: Rain-sensing Wipers
whatItIs: Wipers that start and pace themselves when rain is detected.
whyItMatters: One less thing to manage in sudden monsoon bursts.

name: Keyless Entry & Push Start
whatItIs: Walk up with the key in your pocket, unlock and start with a button.
whyItMatters: Daily-use convenience you immediately miss in cars without it.

name: Cruise Control
whatItIs: Holds a set speed without throttle input (non-adaptive).
whyItMatters: Reduces fatigue and speeding tickets on expressways.

name: Auto-dimming Mirror
whatItIs: Rear-view mirror that auto-dims high-beam glare behind you.
whyItMatters: Night-drive comfort given India's high-beam habits.

name: Powered Tailgate
whatItIs: Electrically opening and closing boot lid.
whyItMatters: Hands-full convenience; pure luxury otherwise.

name: Paddle Shifters
whatItIs: Steering-mounted manual gear control for automatics.
whyItMatters: Useful for engine braking on ghats; otherwise rarely touched.

name: Drive Modes
whatItIs: Selectable throttle/steering maps (Eco/Normal/Sport).
whyItMatters: Sport sharpens response; Eco helps in traffic. Differences are modest.

name: Terrain/Traction Modes
whatItIs: Traction control maps for mud, sand or snow on FWD cars.
whyItMatters: Marginal aid on slush; these are not off-roaders.

name: All-wheel Disc Brakes
whatItIs: Disc brakes on all four wheels instead of rear drums.
whyItMatters: Better fade resistance on ghat descents and repeated hard stops.

name: 16" Alloy Wheels
whatItIs: 16-inch alloy wheels.
whyItMatters: Lighter than steel, better looks; taller sidewalls ride better on bad roads.

name: 17"+ Alloy Wheels
whatItIs: 17-inch or larger diamond-cut alloys.
whyItMatters: Sharper looks and marginally better grip; slightly firmer ride.

name: LED DRLs & Tail Lamps
whatItIs: LED daytime running lights and tail lamps.
whyItMatters: Daytime visibility to other drivers plus signature looks.

name: Rear Defogger & Wiper
whatItIs: Heated rear glass and rear wiper.
whyItMatters: Essential rear visibility in monsoon and winter fog.

name: Factory Dashcam
whatItIs: Built-in front (sometimes dual) dashcam.
whyItMatters: Insurance-dispute gold in Indian traffic.

name: 4WD / AWD
whatItIs: Drive to all four wheels, selectable or automatic.
whyItMatters: Real traction on broken trails, ghats in monsoon and loose surfaces.

name: Third-row Seats
whatItIs: A usable +2 third row of seats.
whyItMatters: Turns the car into a 6/7-seater for the full family.
